title: Vijay Tamil Nadu floor test: TVK numbers, AIADMK split and SC hearing in ‘One-Vote Win’ case — All you need to know
description: Vijay Tamil Nadu floor test: On Tuesday, a group of MLAs announced a revolt against party chief Edappadi K Palaniswami, accusing him of seeking an alliance with archrival DMK, and announced support for the Vijay-led government ahead of the floor test on Wednesday.
